strategies.tips: Speak out loud during problem solving. Discuss complexity tradeoffs before writing any code. Test boundary cases (null, empty, negative, giant values) explicitly.
Start with functional and non-functional requirements (QPS, storage, latency bounds). Sketch high-level services before zooming into database schema, caching layers, and messaging queues.
Construct 5-6 core STAR stories that can adapt to multiple prompts. Focus on peer conflict, dealing with ambiguity, prioritization decisions, and ownership failures.
